name: Dynamic Trend Matrix
author: Uptrick
description: Multi-factor тренд: EMA structure + ATR bands + trailing engine + candle coloring + TP targets + dashboard

entry_buy: Long signal: цена пробила верхнюю ATR band
EMA alignment: fast > base > slow (bullish structure)
Trend pressure подтверждает: EMA structure + smoothed slope согласны
entry_sell: Short signal: цена пробила нижнюю ATR band
EMA alignment: fast < base < slow (bearish structure)
Trend pressure подтверждает: EMA structure + smoothed slope согласны

implementation_note: Многофакторная система с ATR-based bands, EMA structure, trailing engine и staged TP
